title: UMU Little Maid
description: UMU Little Maid is a new little maid mod based on LittleMaidMob!
body:
![Title Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zemelua/UMU-Little-Maid/1.20.x/src/main/resources/assets/materials/title.png)

# What is this?
UMU Little Maid is a mod unofficially developed based on LittleMaidMob.

Players can hire a little maid by giving her a cake. By equipping them with various weapons and items, they will do their jobs accordingly!

With right click, you can switch between three states: sitting/doing activity around there/following her master!

![Screenshot of a maid](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zemelua/UMU-Little-Maid/main/materials/maid.png)

- Many specifications differ from the original.
- Multi-models are not currently supported.
- **Maid voice by “Amitaro’s Voice Material Studio” (https://amitaro.net/)**
